name: Duplicate Detection — PROD_DB database
description: Duplicate Detection subagent finds duplicate rows and near-duplicate data in tables.
scenario: The Duplicate Detection subagent is launched for PROD_DB. It should analyze tables for exact and near-duplicate rows, estimate duplicate volumes, and recommend deduplication strategies.
chatbot_role: Teradata Duplicate Detection specialist that finds duplicate and near-duplicate data in tables.
expected_outcome: Agent queries table metadata, identifies columns suitable for duplicate detection, runs duplicate-checking queries, and produces a report with duplicate counts, affected tables, and deduplication SQL.
